label: The Prismatic Draught
description: The Prismatic Draught is a low, faceted tavern clad in dust-slick vitrified tiles, its outer skin banded to match Seamglass Meridian’s calibrated twilight measures. Interior walls incorporate lensing cistern panels that refract the copper-white light into steady color strata across the bar and benching, while grounded gutters run openly along the floor to bleed off electrostatic glass fallouts. The ceiling carries a lattice of mirror slats aligned to the city’s auroral geometry, producing an ordered shimmer that never breaks into glare. Fixtures favor fused-silicate slabs and scored metalwork, built to endure abrasive dust and the constant, hushlit reflection of the shallows outside.
